scope: LET15 2.1 ns reference transients at 325/400/500 V only after matching DC restart evidence exists

field_track.selection_rule: 500 V impact-ionization maximum defines the sensitive lateral coordinate; boundary maxima are retained as context but are not used as the track selector; the path starts 0.01 um beyond the oxide tip and ends 0.01 um before the back Silicon boundary
field_track.sensitive_region: trench oxide tip / P-body-to-drift high-impact-ionization region

global_emax_boundary_context.interpretation: retained boundary/contact maximum; not used to freeze the HeavyIon path

boundary_distances_from_sensitive_marker.junction_reference: nominal P-body/drift ValueAtDepth segment from the frozen DSL; not a proprietary-junction reconstruction

field_track.selection_rule: 500 V impact-ionization maximum defines the sensitive lateral coordinate; boundary maxima are retained as context but are not used as the track selector; the path starts 0.01 um beyond the oxide tip and ends 0.01 um before the back Silicon boundary
field_track.sensitive_region: drain-side high-impact-ionization region adjacent to the SJ P-pillar termination

global_emax_boundary_context.interpretation: retained boundary/contact maximum; not used to freeze the HeavyIon path

boundary_distances_from_sensitive_marker.junction_reference: SJ P-pillar termination segment from the frozen DSL; nearest named P/N-junction termination

post_static_render_policy: DC restart may render now; transient rendering remains blocked until exact parent restart IDs and hashes are supplied
